title: OnChainAgentID: a provenance-verified benchmark for auditing on-chain agent-vs-human classifiers
description: A benchmark for agent-vs-human classification on Ethereum: 1,147 addresses across 18 provenance-tagged categories, four canonical evaluation splits (random CV, temporal holdout, strict curated core, leave-one-platform-out), and a three-step audit toolkit (onchain_audit) for diagnosing label leakage. Released alongside the WWW '26 submission.
notes: Data license: CC-BY-4.0. Code license (onchain_audit package): MIT. See /FINDINGS_2026-04-08.md for the label-leakage erratum that motivated this release.
